'''âj-f-w-l''' ('''kajafweloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tellurise|tellurise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-f-w-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tellurise|tellurise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-f-w-l
|-
! Lemma
| kajafweloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijafweloko|thijafweloko]] || [[word:jijafweloko|jijafweloko]] || [[word:shijafweloko|shijafweloko]] || [[word:kijafweloko|kijafweloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujafweloko|thuthujafweloko]] || [[word:jujujafweloko|jujujafweloko]] || [[word:shushujafweloko|shushujafweloko]] || [[word:kukujafweloko|kukujafweloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujafweloko|thujafweloko]] || [[word:jujafweloko|jujafweloko]] || [[word:shujafweloko|shujafweloko]] || [[word:kujafweloko|kujafweloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojafweloko|thojafweloko]] || [[word:jojafweloko|jojafweloko]] || [[word:shojafweloko|shojafweloko]] || [[word:kojafweloko|kojafweloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojafweloko|thojafweloko]] || [[word:jojafweloko|jojafweloko]] || [[word:shojafweloko|shojafweloko]] || [[word:kojafweloko|kojafweloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjafweloko|thĂŠjafweloko]] || [[word:jĂŠjafweloko|jĂŠjafweloko]] || [[word:shĂŠjafweloko|shĂŠjafweloko]] || [[word:kĂŠjafweloko|kĂŠjafweloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajafweloko|thathajafweloko]] || [[word:jajajafweloko|jajajafweloko]] || [[word:shashajafweloko|shashajafweloko]] || [[word:kakajafweloko|kakajafweloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajafweloko|thajafweloko]] || [[word:jajafweloko|jajafweloko]] || [[word:shajafweloko|shajafweloko]] || [[word:kajafweloko|kajafweloko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
